history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05 column F, and my current position is row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. To avoid lava and still make progress, I should turn right to face the open cell to my east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07 column D facing up. The cell directly ahead is an open floor cell at row 06 column D, so I can safely move forward and get closer to the goal at row 05 column B. Turning is not necessary yet.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07 column D facing up. The cell ahead is row 06 column D, which is floor and safe. Moving forward brings me closer to the goal visible at row 06 column B.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m now at row 07 column D facing up. The cell directly ahead is row 06 column D, but that is a wall (`#`), so I cannot move forward. The goal is to my left at row 07 column B, and the safe open path is likely by turning left first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07 column D, and after turning left I am facing left. The cell directly ahead is row 07 column C, which is safe floor, while the goal is visible farther ahead at row 05 column D. Moving forward keeps me on the open path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
